task_completion.description: Navigate to the Reports section in HospitalRun
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun application is open and the 'Reports' module or tab is selected in the navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Admissions' or 'Admissions Detail' report type
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu, selection field, or header clearly shows that 'Admissions' or 'Admissions Detail' is the chosen report type.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct start date for the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start date input field contains the date '01/01/2015' (January 1, 2015).

task_completion.description: Enter the correct end date for the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end date input field contains the date '12/31/2025' (December 31, 2025).

task_completion.description: Generate and display the report data
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table, list, or summary of admissions data is visible on the screen, indicating the report was successfully generated.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the report to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool is used to capture the report, and a file named 'admissions_report.png' is visible on the Desktop or in a file manager at the path ~/Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the HospitalRun GUI to generate the report
integrity.visual_evidence: The report generation steps occur within the actual HospitalRun web/Electron interface, not via terminal API curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The report data is not mocked in an external editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The displayed report is inside the HospitalRun application. There are no text editors, HTML editors, or spreadsheet programs open containing manually typed report data.

integrity.description: The screenshot was genuinely captured and saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a screenshot utility (like GNOME Screenshot) to capture the screen and save it as a .png, rather than renaming an empty text file or downloading a pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target report type is 'Admissions' (or 'Admissions Detail'). The required date range is Start Date: 01/01/2015, End Date: 12/31/2025. The final output must be a screenshot saved exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/admissions_report.png' with a file size of at least 10KB (indicating a real image capture).
